title: En Uyirin Uyiraga Lyrics Bramman Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: En Uyirin Uyiraga
Singer(s): Anitha, Devi Sri Prasad
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Movie: Bramman

En Uyirin Uyiraga
en vizhiyin oliyaaga
en manadhin isaiyaaga
varuvaaya varuvaaya?

en iravin kanavaaga
en nadhiyin karaiyaaga
en vazhiyin thunnaiaaga
varuvaaya varuvaayaa ?

Mazhai peidhaal enna
veyil kaaindhaal enna.
kadal neelam mattum
endrum saayam pogaadhey.

Unnai  ennum neram
idhayathin oram
adi eeramillaa saaral
ondru veesudhey.

En Uyirin Uyiraga
en vizhiyin oliyaaga
en manadhin isaiyaaga
varuvaaya varuvaaya?

en iravin kanavaaga
en nadhiyin karaiyaaga
en vazhiyin thunnaiaaga
varuvaaya varuvaayaa ?

Oh panjile thaavum theeyum
nenjile vazhum anbum.
Oyumaa? adi oyumaa?
adhu melum melum koodum.

Kadhalai kannil kanda
kadavulai neril paarthaal.
Pottrava illai thoottravaa?
naan kulambi pogireney.

Mayil thogai sumandhaalum
mara vandu polethaan.
manadhoram unai aetri
medu pallam paaraamal sendren.

En Uyirin Uyiraga
en vizhiyin oliyaaga
en manadhin isaiyaaga
varuvaaya varuvaaya?

Paarayin naduve kinaraa?
nadhigalin naduve padagaa ?
niyabagam un niyabagam
ennai thaangi kondu pogum.

Unnidam illaa tharunam
swasikkum nodiyum maranam
aayulin neelamey
un anaippin neelamey.

Pani peyyum neeraale
malai ondrum karaiyaadhu
tholai dhooram ponaalum
unnai thaedi ododi varuven.

En Uyirin Uyiraga
en vizhiyin oliyaaga
en manadhin isaiyaaga
varuvaaya varuvaaya?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'En Uyirin Uyiraga'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the feelings of a lover yearning for their beloved.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Bramman.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Anitha and Devi Sri Prasad.

Who composed the music for 'En Uyirin Uyiraga'?

The music for this song was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was 'En Uyirin Uyiraga' released?

The song was released on February 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Bramman, the song En Uyirin Uyiraga serves as a poignant expression of love, capturing the essence of yearning and emotional connection between lovers. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. As the characters navigate their feelings, this song beautifully underscores their journey, making it a memorable highlight of the film. The collaboration between Anitha's vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's composition creates an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Uyirin Uyiraga from Bramman is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Anitha's soulful vocals complemented by Devi Sri Prasad's enchanting music, this song creates an emotional atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that elevates the song to a heartfelt expression of affection.
stanzaMeanings: Will you come as the life of my life, as the light of my eyes, as the music of my heart?
Will you come as the dream of my soul, as the shore of my river, as the essence of my path?
If it rains, what will happen? If the sun shines, what will happen? The ocean's blue should never fade away.
Even if you are always in my heart, a gentle breeze will blow without any hesitation.
Will you come as the life of my life, as the light of my eyes, as the music of my heart?
Will you come as the dream of my soul, as the shore of my river, as the essence of my path?
Oh, the fire and the warmth live in the heart. Is it true? Is it true? It will grow more and more.
When love is seen in the eyes, and when God is seen in the heart, is there praise or blame? I am getting lost.
Even if the peacock dances, it will eventually fade away. My heart does not lift you up, and I will not look back.
Will you come as the life of my life, as the light of my eyes, as the music of my heart?
In the middle of the river, is there a bridge? In the middle of the rivers, is there a path? Your memory will take me away.
Without you, youth and breath become death, the vastness of life and your vastness.
Even if the rain falls, the mist will not cover the shore. Even if I go far away, I will run to find you.
Will you come as the life of my life, as the light of my eyes, as the music of my heart?
Will you come as the dream of my soul, ...
